instruction:
This is a lecture slide page. Extract its content as Markdown:
- The slide title (large text at top) → ## heading
- Bullet points → - list items
- Any table → Markdown table
- Any formula or equation → LaTeX inside $...$
- Any diagram/graph → brief description in [Diagram: ...]
Output only the Markdown content, no commentary.
